occupation: Group Chief Executive Officer at Glynt
headline: Building Africa’s most intelligent media network | Tractor Outdoor | Innovocean | Polygon | BMT | ignis | Mischief Media | AI × DOOH | Founder
summary:
Simon Wall is the Group CEO and a founding shareholder of The Glynt Group  (formely Tractor Media Holdings)

The Glynt Group is one of South Africa’s leading independent media groups, specializing in technology-driven media.

Portfolio Companies:
Tractor Outdoor – One of the largest providers of premium DOOH and OOH locations in South Africa.
Polygon – The largest programmatically enabled DOOH network of non-owned digital screens across multiple venues across Africa 
Innovocean – The exclusive provider of all DOOH and OOH in the V&A Waterfront, Cape Town - the busiest Tourist Destination in Africa 
Mischief – Specializing in activations and innovations in OOH environments.
BMT – Sales, installation, and maintenance of LED screens and networks nationwide.
Ignis - Building intelligent technology solutions that fuse innovation, data integration and AI to power smarter business growth and home to South Africa's favorite loyalty aggregator app - MyCards...

With nearly 20 years of experience in marketing and OOH media, Simon is responsible for spotting new business opportunities and driving strategic innovation across varied markets.

A passionate advocate for technology and innovation, Simon brings brands to life through impactful DOOH campaigns. His work spans diverse international markets, including Portugal, Germany, Hong Kong, Dubai, Oman, and the Maldives, giving him unique insight into the global outdoor media landscape. He holds a degree in Politics and Philosophy from the University of Cape Town and a postgraduate diploma in Marketing.
location_str: City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Group Chief Executive Officer
experiences.location: City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Group Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: Currently Group CEO of Tractor Media Holdings – one of the largest independent media companies in South Africa – with a portfolio of companies specializing in DOOH and OOH media and technology-related media services

experiences.title: Co Founder
experiences.description: -	Identified and established South Africa’s first mall-focused media sales house and built the company to profitability within six months. Grew to manage the advertising positions in 12 premier shopping malls belonging to Old Mutual, South Africa’s largest property owner and financial services company. Ad revenues were more than doubled in two years.

volunteer_work.title: Trustee
volunteer_work.description: Appointed trustee for the Domestic Workers Association Educational Trust  - a non profit organization based in Cape Town specializing in Services To Children; Adoption Services; Child Development Centers; Foster Care; Includes Infant Care Centers And Nurseries
